title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the TVS Supply Chain Solutions family as a Logistics Manager in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
